local PlaneTexture = {}
PlaneTexture.__index = PlaneTexture

function PlaneTexture.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, PlaneTexture)
    self.rotateSpeed = config.rotateSpeed or 30
    return self
end

function PlaneTexture:Update(dt)
    local rot = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(0), math.rad(0), math.rad(os.clock() * self.rotateSpeed))
    -- Gets the Propeller Material
    -- UNCONVERTED: Material.SetMatrix("_TextureRotation", m) — Roblox materials/SurfaceAppearance
    -- expose no per-frame texture-rotation matrix uniform; there is no shader-uniform API.
    local _ = rot
end

return PlaneTexture

scripts.name: Door
scripts.source:
local Door = {}
Door.__index = Door

function Door.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Door)
    config = config or {}
    -- Scalars only; never touch self.host / GetComponent here.
    self.closeTime = config.closeTime or 5
    return self
end

function Door:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- if (other.tag == "Player")
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end  -- ignore non-player touches
        if self:_hasKey(plr) then
            self:ToggleDoor(true)
        end
    end)

    -- OnTriggerExit(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "TouchEnded", function(other)
        -- if (other.tag == "Player")
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end  -- ignore non-player touches
        if self:_hasKey(plr) then
            self:ToggleDoor(false)
        end
    end)
end

-- other.GetComponent<Player>().hasKey — read the canonical cross-script Attribute
-- mirror (Player writes "hasKey" on the Player Instance + Character Model), not the
-- Player module's private field.
function Door:_hasKey(plr)
    local v = plr:GetAttribute("hasKey")
    if not v and plr.Character then
        v = plr.Character:GetAttribute("hasKey")
    end
    return v
end

-- private AudioSource source { get { return GetComponent<AudioSource>(); } }
function Door:_getSource()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

-- private Animator doorAnim { get { return transform.parent.Find("door").GetComponent<Animator>(); } }
function Door:_getDoorAnim()
    local parent = self.gameObject.Parent
    return parent and parent:FindFirstChild("door")
end

function Door:ToggleDoor(value)
    -- doorAnim.SetBool("open", value) — Animator params degrade to attributes (no
    -- skeletal pipeline); record on the "door" sibling object.
    local doorObj = self:_getDoorAnim()
    if doorObj then
        doorObj:SetAttribute("open", value)
    end

    local source = self:_getSource()
    if source then
        -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f)
        source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8
        source:Play()
    end
end

return Door

local GameManager = {}
GameManager.__index = GameManager

function GameManager.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, GameManager)
    return self
end

function GameManager:Awake()
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    -- Cursor.visible = false
    UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = false
    -- Cursor.lockState = CursorLockMode.Locked
    UserInputService.MouseBehavior = Enum.MouseBehavior.LockCenter
end

function GameManager:RestartGame(time)
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        task.wait(time)
        -- SceneManager.LoadScene(0): UNCONVERTED -- Roblox has no scene-reload API; reloading the active scene/level has no faithful equivalent.
    end)
end

return GameManager

scripts.name: HostilePlane
scripts.source:
local Class = {}
Class.__index = Class

local Player = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true))

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function Class.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Class)
    config = config or {}
    -- Scalars only; never touch self.host / GetComponent here.
    -- [Range(3f, 10f)] public float shootTimer = 5f
    self.shootTimer = config.shootTimer or 5

    -- private Transform target
    self.target = nil
    return self
end

function Class:Start()
    -- target = Player.instance.transform
    self.target = Player.instance

    -- StartCoroutine(TimedShooting())
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        while self.target ~= nil do
            task.wait(self.shootTimer)

            -- Instantiate(ammoPrefab, origin.position, origin.rotation)
            local origin = self:_origin()
            if origin and self.ammoPrefab then
                self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.ammoPrefab, workspace, origin:GetPivot())
            end

            -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f); source.PlayOneShot(shootSound); source.pitch = 1
            local pitch = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8
            self:_playOneShot(self.shootSound, pitch)
        end
    end)
end

function Class:FixedUpdate(dt)
    if self.target ~= nil then
        -- origin.LookAt(target.position + Vector3.up * 2)
        local origin = self:_origin()
        if origin then
            local originPos = origin:GetPivot().Position
            local targetPos = self.target:GetPivot().Position + Vector3.new(0, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER, 0)
            origin:PivotTo(CFrame.lookAt(originPos, targetPos))
        end
    end
end

-- private Transform origin { get { return transform.Find("Origin"); } }
function Class:_origin()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Origin")
end

-- private AudioSource source { get { return GetComponent<AudioSource>(); } }
-- PlayOneShot(clip) with a per-shot pitch, emulating AudioSource.pitch + PlayOneShot.
function Class:_playOneShot(soundId, pitch)
    if not soundId then return end
    local s = Instance.new("Sound")
    s.SoundId = soundId
    s.PlaybackSpeed = pitch or 1
    local part = self.gameObject
    if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
        s.Parent = part
    else
        s.Parent = game:GetService("SoundService")
    end
    s:Play()
    s.Ended:Connect(function() s:Destroy() end)
    task.delay(5, function() if s and s.Parent then s:Destroy() end end)
end

return Class

scripts.name: HudControl
scripts.source:
local HudControl = {}
HudControl.__index = HudControl

local Player = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true))

-- Idempotent shared-BindableEvent factory. Mirrors Player's own static-event
-- creation so HudControl and Player converge on the SAME module-table field
-- regardless of Awake ordering (no duplicate BindableEvents in ReplicatedStorage).
local function ensureBindable(name)
    local rs = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    local existing = rs:FindFirstChild(name)
    if existing then return existing end
    local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
    b.Name = name
    b.Parent = rs
    return b
end

function HudControl.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, HudControl)
    config = config or {}
    -- No scalar config; HUD references resolve lazily from self.gameObject in Awake onward.
    return self
end

-- Reference getters: Unity's properties re-Find each access, so these re-resolve
-- the child each call (the HUD subtree is stable but cheap to look up).

-- private Transform module { get { return transform.Find("Module"); } }
function HudControl:_module()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Module")
end

-- private Transform itemModule { get { return transform.Find("ItemModule"); } }
function HudControl:_itemModule()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("ItemModule")
end

-- private Transform ammo { get { return module.Find("Ammo"); } }
function HudControl:_ammo()
    local m = self:_module()
    return m and m:FindFirstChild("Ammo")
end

-- private GameObject pauseMenu { get { return transform.Find("Pause").gameObject; } }
function HudControl:_pauseMenu()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Pause")
end

-- private Text ammoCur { get { return ammo.Find("Cur").GetComponent<Text>(); } }
function HudControl:_ammoCur()
    local a = self:_ammo()
    return a and a:FindFirstChild("Cur")
end

-- private Slider health { get { return module.Find("Health").GetComponent<Slider>(); } }
function HudControl:_health()
    local m = self:_module()
    return m and m:FindFirstChild("Health")
end

-- Best-effort Text.text writer: Unity Text → Roblox TextLabel/Button/Box; if the
-- found object is a container, drive the first text descendant.
function HudControl:_setText(obj, str)
    if not obj then return end
    if obj:IsA("TextLabel") or obj:IsA("TextButton") or obj:IsA("TextBox") then
        obj.Text = str
        return
    end
    for _, d in obj:GetDescendants() do
        if d:IsA("TextLabel") or d:IsA("TextButton") or d:IsA("TextBox") then
            d.Text = str
            return
        end
    end
end

function HudControl:Awake()
    -- ammo.Find("Total").GetComponent<Text>().text = Player.maxAmmo.ToString();
    local ammo = self:_ammo()
    if ammo then
        local total = ammo:FindFirstChild("Total")
        if total then self:_setText(total, tostring(Player.maxAmmo)) end
    end

    -- Player.HealthUpdate += UpdatePlayerHealth; (and Ammo/Item/Pause).
    -- Connect to the SAME shared field Player fires on (idempotent create) so
    -- ordering between HudControl.Awake and Player.Awake is irrelevant.
    Player.HealthUpdate = Player.HealthUpdate or ensureBindable("HealthUpdate")
    Player.AmmoUpdate = Player.AmmoUpdate or ensureBindable("AmmoUpdate")
    Player.ItemUpdate = Player.ItemUpdate or ensureBindable("ItemUpdate")
    Player.PauseEvent = Player.PauseEvent or ensureBindable("PauseEvent")

    Player.HealthUpdate.Event:Connect(function(curHealth) self:UpdatePlayerHealth(curHealth) end)
    Player.AmmoUpdate.Event:Connect(function(curAmmo) self:UpdatePlayerAmmo(curAmmo) end)
    Player.ItemUpdate.Event:Connect(function(itemName) self:UpdatePlayerItems(itemName) end)
    Player.PauseEvent.Event:Connect(function(pause) self:PauseMenu(pause) end)
end

function HudControl:PauseMenu(pause)
    -- Time.timeScale = pause ? 0 : 1. Roblox has no global time-scale freeze; record
    -- the intended scale on workspace so any reader can observe the paused state.
    workspace:SetAttribute("TimeScale", pause and 0 or 1)

    -- muted/normal are AudioMixerSnapshot serialized fields; AudioMixerSnapshot has no
    -- Roblox equivalent, so muted.TransitionTo(0) / normal.TransitionTo(0) is inert.
    -- UNCONVERTED: AudioMixerSnapshot.TransitionTo

    -- pauseMenu.SetActive(pause): the pause UI is a GuiObject, so toggle Visible.
    local pm = self:_pauseMenu()
    if pm then
        if pm:IsA("GuiObject") then
            pm.Visible = pause
        else
            self.host.setActive(pm, pause)
        end
    end
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerItems(itemName)
    -- itemModule.Find(itemName).GetComponent<Toggle>().isOn = true;
    local im = self:_itemModule()
    if not im then return end
    local item = im:FindFirstChild(itemName)
    if not item then return end
    -- Roblox has no Toggle; record isOn and best-effort reveal the collected item.
    item:SetAttribute("isOn", true)
    if item:IsA("GuiObject") then item.Visible = true end
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerAmmo(curAmmo)
    -- ammoCur.text = curAmmo.ToString();
    self:_setText(self:_ammoCur(), tostring(curAmmo))
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerHealth(curHealth)
    -- float percentage = (float)curHealth / Player.maxHealth; health.value = percentage;
    local percentage = curHealth / Player.maxHealth
    local h = self:_health()
    if h then
        -- Roblox has no Slider; record the normalized value and, best-effort, drive a
        -- child "Fill" bar's horizontal scale.
        h:SetAttribute("Value", percentage)
        local fill = h:FindFirstChild("Fill")
        if fill and fill:IsA("GuiObject") then
            fill.Size = UDim2.new(percentage, 0, fill.Size.Y.Scale, fill.Size.Y.Offset)
        end
    end
end

return HudControl

scripts.name: Machine
scripts.source:
local Machine = {}
Machine.__index = Machine

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function Machine.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Machine)
    config = config or {}
    -- Scalars / plain state only. Serialized references (itemPrefabs, doors,
    -- planeHolder) are injected on self by the host before Awake.
    self.activated = 0
    self.items = {}
    self.itemNames = {}
    self.itemPlaced = {false, false, false}
    return self
end

function Machine:Awake()
    -- items[i] = transform.Find("Item " + (i + 1)); itemNames[i] = itemPrefabs[i].name.
    for i = 0, 3 do
        self.items[i + 1] = self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Item " .. (i + 1))
        if i < 3 then
            -- Serialized prefab fields are injected as opaque prefab_ids; the host
            -- supplies a readable name when the handle carries one.
            local prefab = self.itemPrefabs and self.itemPrefabs[i + 1]
            if prefab then
                self.itemNames[i + 1] = prefab.name
            end
        end
    end

    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- other.tag == "Player": resolve the owning Player from the raw touch part.
        local player = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not player then return end
        -- player.hasItems.Contains(itemNames[i]) -> read the canonical "has<Item>"
        -- Attribute the Player script mirrors on pickup (cross-script contract).
        for i = 0, 2 do
            local nm = self.itemNames[i + 1]
            if nm then
                local flag = "has" .. (nm:gsub("[^%w_]+", "_"))
                if player:GetAttribute(flag) then
                    self:PlaceItem(i)
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

function Machine:PlaceItem(number)
    if not self.itemPlaced[number + 1] then
        -- Instantiate(itemPrefabs[number], items[activated].position, items[activated].rotation),
        -- then SetParent(items[activated++]) -- both use the current activated, then increment.
        local slot = self.items[self.activated + 1]
        local cf = (slot and slot:GetPivot()) or CFrame.new()
        local item = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.itemPrefabs[number + 1], slot, cf)
        if item and slot then
            item.Parent = slot
        end
        self.activated = self.activated + 1
        self.itemPlaced[number + 1] = true

        if number < 2 then
            -- doors[number].SendMessage("ToggleDoor", true, DontRequireReceiver):
            -- signal the Door via the canonical cross-script Attribute channel.
            local door = self.doors and self.doors[number + 1]
            if door then
                door:SetAttribute("ToggleDoor", true)
            end
        end

        -- planeHolder.SetInteger("actionNumber", activated): inert Animator param mirror.
        if self.planeHolder then
            self.planeHolder:SetAttribute("actionNumber", self.activated)
        end

        if self.activated == 3 then
            -- Instantiate(itemPrefabs[activated], items[activated].position, Quaternion.identity).
            local finalSlot = self.items[self.activated + 1]
            local pos = (finalSlot and finalSlot:GetPivot().Position) or Vector3.new()
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.itemPrefabs[self.activated + 1], workspace, CFrame.new(pos))
        end
    end
end

return Machine

scripts.name: Menu
scripts.source:
local Menu = {}
Menu.__index = Menu

function Menu.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Menu)
    self.startable = false
    self._firePrev = false
    return self
end

-- C# property: private AudioSource source { get { return GetComponent<AudioSource>() } }
function Menu:getSource()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Menu:Awake()
    -- Cursor.visible = true / Cursor.lockState = CursorLockMode.None
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = true
    UserInputService.MouseBehavior = Enum.MouseBehavior.Default
end

function Menu:Update(dt)
    if self.startable then
        -- Input.GetButtonDown("Fire") — edge-detect the fire button (MouseButton1)
        local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
        local fireNow = UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1)
        if fireNow and not self._firePrev then
            self:StartGame()
        end
        self._firePrev = fireNow
    end
end

function Menu:StartGame()
    -- UNCONVERTED: SceneManager.LoadScene(1) — Roblox has no in-place scene loader; use TeleportService to a published place id.
    warn("Menu:StartGame — scene loading unsupported (Unity SceneManager.LoadScene)")
end

function Menu:ToControls()
    local controls = self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Controls")
    if controls then
        self.host.setActive(controls, true)
    end
    local source = self:getSource()
    if source then
        source:Play()
    end
    self.startable = true
end

function Menu:QuitGame()
    -- UNCONVERTED: Application.Quit() — no Roblox equivalent for quitting the client.
end

return Menu

scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Mine = {}
Mine.__index = Mine

function Mine.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Mine)
    self.explodeTime = config.explodeTime or 1
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    return self
end

function Mine:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        local sound = self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
        if sound then sound:Play() end
        self.host.invoke(self, "Explode", self.explodeTime)
    end)
end

function Mine:Explode()
    local pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
    self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosion, workspace, CFrame.new(pos))

    local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(pos, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER)
    local hit = {}
    for _, col in cols do
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(col)
        if plr and not hit[plr] then
            hit[plr] = true
            local char = plr.Character
            local humanoid = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                humanoid:TakeDamage(self.damage)
            end
        end
    end

    self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
end

return Mine

scripts.name: Pickup
scripts.source:
local Pickup = {}
Pickup.__index = Pickup

function Pickup.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Pickup)
    self.itemName = config.itemName
    self.rotationSpeed = config.rotationSpeed or 100
    self.downVector = nil
    self.upVector = nil
    return self
end

function Pickup:getSource()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Pickup:Awake()
    local pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
    self.downVector = pos - Vector3.new(0, 1, 0) / 2
    self.upVector = pos

    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end  -- ignore non-player touches

        -- other.SendMessage("GetItem", itemName) -> drive the Player component's GetItem
        local playerComp = self.host.findObjectOfType("Player")
        if playerComp then
            playerComp:GetItem(self.itemName)
        end

        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)

    self:MoveDown()
end

function Pickup:Update(dt)
    self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(dt * self.rotationSpeed), 0))
end

function Pickup:MoveDown()
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        local dt = 1 / 60
        while self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position.Y > self.downVector.Y + 0.05 do
            self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() + Vector3.new(0, -1, 0) / 2 * dt)
            dt = task.wait()
        end
        self:MoveUp()
    end)
end

function Pickup:MoveUp()
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        local dt = 1 / 60
        while self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position.Y < self.upVector.Y - 0.05 do
            self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0) / 2 * dt)
            dt = task.wait()
        end
        self:MoveDown()
    end)
end

return Pickup

scripts.name: Plane
scripts.source:
local Plane = {}
Plane.__index = Plane

function Plane.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Plane)
    config = config or {}
    -- Scalars only; serialized refs (flyingPlane, cutsceneCamera) arrive on self.
    return self
end

function Plane:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- other.CompareTag("Player")
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end

        -- Player player = other.GetComponent<Player>();
        -- player.hasItems.Exists(x => x.Equals("GasCan"))  →  canonical "hasGasCan"
        -- attribute mirror written by Player:GetItem. Read Player Instance + Character.
        local hasGasCan = plr:GetAttribute("hasGasCan")
        if not hasGasCan and plr.Character then
            hasGasCan = plr.Character:GetAttribute("hasGasCan")
        end
        if not hasGasCan then return end

        -- GameObject plane = Instantiate(flyingPlane);
        -- plane.transform.SetParent(transform.parent);
        if self.flyingPlane then
            local parent = self.gameObject.Parent
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.flyingPlane, parent, self.gameObject:GetPivot())
        end

        -- FindAnyObjectByType<GameManager>().SendMessage("RestartGame", 5);
        local gm = self.host.findObjectOfType("GameManager")
        if gm then gm:RestartGame(5) end

        -- Destroy(player.gameObject);
        if plr.Character then
            self.host.destroy(plr.Character)
        end

        -- cutsceneCamera.GetComponent<Camera>().enabled = true;
        -- cutsceneCamera.GetComponent<AudioListener>().enabled = true;
        -- Roblox cameras are host-owned; switch the current camera to the cutscene
        -- viewpoint (AudioListener has no per-camera Roblox analog).
        local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera
        if cam then
            cam.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
            if self.cutsceneCamera then
                cam.CFrame = self.cutsceneCamera:GetPivot()
            end
        end

        -- Destroy(gameObject);
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

return Plane

scripts.name: PlaneBullet
scripts.source:
local PlaneBullet = {}
PlaneBullet.__index = PlaneBullet

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function PlaneBullet.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, PlaneBullet)
    self.fadeTime = config.fadeTime or 6
    self.force = config.force or 200
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    return self
end

function PlaneBullet:getRb()
    return self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
end

function PlaneBullet:Awake()
    -- OnCollisionEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local _pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position

        -- Instantiate(explosion, transform.position, Quaternion.identity)
        if self.explosion then
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosion, workspace, CFrame.new(_pos))
        end

        -- Physics.OverlapSphere(transform.position, 2) — 2 metres -> studs
        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(_pos, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER)
        local _hit = {}
        for _, col in cols do
            -- if col.tag == "Player"
            local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(col)
            if plr and not _hit[plr] then
                _hit[plr] = true
                -- col.SendMessage("TakeDamage", damage)
                local _char = plr.Character
                local _hum = _char and _char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if _hum then
                    _hum:TakeDamage(self.damage)
                end
            end
        end

        -- Destroy(gameObject)
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

function PlaneBullet:Start()
    -- rb.AddRelativeForce(Vector3.forward * force, ForceMode.Impulse)
    local rb = self:getRb()
    if rb then
        rb:ApplyImpulse(self.gameObject:GetPivot().LookVector * self.force)
    end

    -- Destroy(gameObject, fadeTime) — target-lifetime-bound delayed destroy
    task.delay(self.fadeTime, function()
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

return PlaneBullet

scripts.name: Player
scripts.source:
local Player = {}
Player.__index = Player

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571
Player.maxHealth = 100
Player.maxAmmo = 250

function Player.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Player)
    config = config or {}
    -- Scalars only; never touch self.host / GetComponent here.
    self.speed = config.speed or 6
    self.jumpSpeed = config.jumpSpeed or 1.5
    self.gravity = config.gravity or 0.5
    self.shootRange = config.shootRange or 100
    self.minAngle = config.minAngle or -30
    self.maxAngle = config.maxAngle or 45
    self.sensitivity = config.sensitivity or 200
    self.healAmount = config.healAmount or 25
    self.ammoAmount = config.ammoAmount or 40

    self.curHealth = Player.maxHealth
    self.curAmmo = 0
    self.gotItems = {}
    self.gotWeapon = false
    self.gotKey = false
    self.walkTime = 0
    self.timeScale = 1

    -- Edge-detection state for key/mouse "GetKeyDown"/"GetButtonDown".
    self._keyHeld = {}
    self._fireHeld = false
    self._pauseHeld = false
    return self
end

function Player:Awake()
    -- static GameObject instance = gameObject
    Player.instance = self.gameObject

    self.source = self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
    -- CharacterController + camera are host-owned; movement/aim run through
    -- self.host.player. weaponSlot was cam.GetChild(0); with the camera owned by
    -- the host, fall back to this GameObject as the weapon parent.
    self.weaponSlot = self.gameObject

    -- Static cross-script events: parent to ReplicatedStorage so other scripts can
    -- find and :Connect them. Idempotent.
    Player.HealthUpdate = Player.HealthUpdate or (function() local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent"); b.Name = "HealthUpdate"; b.Parent = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"); return b end)()
    Player.AmmoUpdate = Player.AmmoUpdate or (function() local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent"); b.Name = "AmmoUpdate"; b.Parent = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"); return b end)()
    Player.ItemUpdate = Player.ItemUpdate or (function() local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent"); b.Name = "ItemUpdate"; b.Parent = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"); return b end)()
    Player.PauseEvent = Player.PauseEvent or (function() local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent"); b.Name = "PauseEvent"; b.Parent = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"); return b end)()
end

function Player:Update(dt)
    self:Shoot()
    -- Rotate() and Move() are host-owned (camera aim + character movement);
    -- self.host.player drives them. See those methods for details.

    -- Pause toggle. Unity used KeyCode.Escape, which Roblox reserves; remapped to P.
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local pDown = UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.P)
    if pDown and not self._pauseHeld then
        local pause = self.timeScale > 0
        if Player.PauseEvent then Player.PauseEvent:Fire(pause) end
    end
    self._pauseHeld = pDown

    -- Dev bypass keys (Unity #if UNITY_EDITOR || DEVELOPMENT_BUILD).
    self:Bypass()
end

function Player:Bypass()
    if self:_keyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F1) then
        self.gotKey = true
        self:_setSharedFlag("hasKey", true)
    elseif self:_keyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F2) then
        self:GetItem("Battery")
    elseif self:_keyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F3) then
        self:GetItem("SmallBattery")
    elseif self:_keyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F4) then
        self:GetItem("MediumBattery")
    elseif self:_keyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F5) then
        self:GetItem("GasCan")
    end
end

-- Controls camera rotation oriented by mouse position.
function Player:Rotate()
    -- Camera aim is host-owned via self.host.player; the host applies mouse look
    -- and clamps pitch. Recoil is applied in Shoot via applyRecoil.
    -- UNCONVERTED: aim is driven by the host, not the player script.
end

-- Controls movement with CharacterController.
function Player:Move()
    -- Movement is host-owned via self.host.player. The walk-sound feedback depended
    -- on host-private grounded/moveDirection state, which is not exposed here.
    -- UNCONVERTED: movement is driven by the host, not the player script.
end

-- Raycasts to the target position, and sends a message to the object if hit.
function Player:Shoot()
    if self.gotWeapon and self:_fireDown() then
        if self.curAmmo > 0 then
            self:_playOneShot(self.shootSound)
            self.curAmmo = self.curAmmo - 1
            if Player.AmmoUpdate then Player.AmmoUpdate:Fire(self.curAmmo) end
            -- camRotation.x -= 2 (recoil pitch kick, in degrees)
            self.host.player:applyRecoil(2)

            -- Muzzle flare at the bullet origin.
            if self.feedbackPrefab and self.bulletOrigin then
                local cf = self.bulletOrigin:GetPivot()
                local gunFlare = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.feedbackPrefab, self.bulletOrigin, cf)
                if gunFlare then
                    task.delay(0.1, function() self.host.destroy(gunFlare) end)
                end
            end

            -- Hitscan from the camera center (Camera.main center ray).
            local look = self.host.player:getLookCFrame()
            local origin = look.Position
            local dir = look.LookVector
            local params = RaycastParams.new()
            local result = workspace:Raycast(origin, dir.Unit * (self.shootRange * STUDS_PER_METER), params)
            if result then
                -- SendMessage("TakeDamage", DontRequireReceiver): deliver damage to the
                -- hit object's owning model if it carries a damageable Humanoid.
                local model = result.Instance:FindFirstAncestorWhichIsA("Model")
                local hum = model and model:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
                if hum then hum:TakeDamage(100) end

                if self.feedbackPrefab then
                    local hitFlare = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.feedbackPrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(result.Position))
                    if hitFlare then
                        task.delay(0.2, function() self.host.destroy(hitFlare) end)
                    end
                end
            end
        else
            self:_playOneShot(self.dryFireSound)
        end
    end
end

-- Updates the player spawnpoint by a given point.
function Player:UpdateSpawnpoint(newPoint)
    self.spawnPoint = newPoint
end

-- Takes a given amount of damage.
function Player:TakeDamage(amount)
    self.curHealth = self.curHealth - amount
    if self.curHealth <= 0 then
        if self.spawnPoint then
            -- Respawn is host-owned: teleport to the spawn transform.
            self.host.player:teleport(self.spawnPoint:GetPivot())
        end
        self.curHealth = Player.maxHealth
    end
    self:_playOneShot(self.hitSound)
    if Player.HealthUpdate then Player.HealthUpdate:Fire(self.curHealth) end
end

-- Recovers the default amount of health.
function Player:RecoverHealth()
    if self.curHealth == Player.maxHealth then
        return
    end

    self.curHealth = self.curHealth + self.healAmount
    if self.curHealth > Player.maxHealth then
        self.curHealth = Player.maxHealth
    end

    self:_playOneShot(self.pickHealthSound)
    if Player.HealthUpdate then Player.HealthUpdate:Fire(self.curHealth) end
end

-- Collects a given amount of ammunition.
function Player:TakeAmmo(amount)
    self.curAmmo = self.curAmmo + amount
    if self.curAmmo > Player.maxAmmo then
        self.curAmmo = Player.maxAmmo
    end

    self:_playOneShot(self.pickAmmoSound)
    if Player.AmmoUpdate then Player.AmmoUpdate:Fire(self.curAmmo) end
end

-- Gets the rifle and equips it.
function Player:GetRifle()
    self:_playOneShot(self.pickAmmoSound)
    if self.riflePrefab then
        local slot = self.weaponSlot or self.gameObject
        local rifle = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.riflePrefab, slot, slot:GetPivot())
        if rifle then
            -- localScale = Vector3.one * 0.2; localPosition zero; localRotation identity.
            if rifle:IsA("Model") then
                rifle:ScaleTo(0.2)
            end
            rifle:PivotTo(slot:GetPivot())
        end
    end
    self.gotWeapon = true
    self:TakeAmmo(20)
end

-- Gets an item and processes its required logic.
function Player:GetItem(itemName)
    -- Canonical attribute mirror BEFORE the local-field update so cross-script
    -- readers (Door checks hasKey, HUD, etc.) and the server see the pickup.
    if itemName and itemName ~= "" then
        local flag = "has" .. (itemName:gsub("[^%w_]+", "_"))
        self:_setSharedFlag(flag, true)
    end

    if itemName == "Key" then
        self.gotKey = true
        self:_playOneShot(self.pickSound)
    elseif itemName == "Rifle" then
        self:GetRifle()
    elseif itemName == "Health" then
        self:RecoverHealth()
    elseif itemName == "Ammo" then
        self:TakeAmmo(self.ammoAmount)
    else
        table.insert(self.gotItems, itemName)
        self:_playOneShot(self.pickSound)
        if Player.ItemUpdate then Player.ItemUpdate:Fire(itemName) end
    end
end

-- public bool hasKey { get { return gotKey; } }
function Player:getHasKey()
    return self.gotKey
end

-- public List<string> hasItems { get { return gotItems; } }
function Player:getHasItems()
    return self.gotItems
end

-- Writes a shared player flag: canonical Attribute mirror on the Player + Character,
-- plus the authoritative server mirror via the autogen PlayerSetSharedFlag RemoteEvent.
function Player:_setSharedFlag(flag, value)
    local plr = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
    if plr then plr:SetAttribute(flag, value) end
    local char = plr and plr.Character
    if char then char:SetAttribute(flag, value) end
    local rs = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    local sf = rs:FindFirstChild("PlayerSetSharedFlag")
    if sf then sf:FireServer(flag, value) end
end

-- PlayOneShot(clip, [volume]) with randomized pitch (Random.Range(0.8, 1.2)).
function Player:_playOneShot(soundId, volume)
    if not soundId then return end
    local s = Instance.new("Sound")
    s.SoundId = soundId
    s.Volume = volume or 1
    s.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8
    local part = self.gameObject
    if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
        s.Parent = part
    else
        s.Parent = game:GetService("SoundService")
    end
    s:Play()
    s.Ended:Connect(function() s:Destroy() end)
    task.delay(5, function() if s and s.Parent then s:Destroy() end end)
end

-- Edge-detected key press, emulating Input.GetKeyDown.
function Player:_keyDown(key)
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local down = UIS:IsKeyDown(key)
    local edge = down and not self._keyHeld[key]
    self._keyHeld[key] = down
    return edge
end

-- Edge-detected fire, emulating Input.GetButtonDown("Fire").
function Player:_fireDown()
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local down = UIS:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1)
    local edge = down and not self._fireHeld
    self._fireHeld = down
    return edge
end

return Player

scripts.name: SpawnPoint
scripts.source:
local SpawnPoint = {}
SpawnPoint.__index = SpawnPoint

function SpawnPoint.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, SpawnPoint)
    return self
end

function SpawnPoint:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end  -- ignore non-player touches

        -- other.SendMessage("UpdateSpawnpoint", transform): Roblox has no name-dispatch;
        -- locate the touching player's Player component and call it directly.
        local playerComp = self.host.findObjectOfType("Player")
        if playerComp and playerComp.UpdateSpawnpoint then
            playerComp:UpdateSpawnpoint(self.transform)
        end

        if self.activateOnSpawn ~= nil then
            self.host.setActive(self.activateOnSpawn, true)
        end

        self.host.destroy(self)
    end)
end

return SpawnPoint

scripts.name: Turret
scripts.source:
local State = { Default = 0, Engaged = 1, Search = 2 }

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Turret = {}
Turret.__index = Turret

function Turret.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Turret)
    -- Scalar config only; host surface is not bound yet (rule e).
    if config.rotate ~= nil then
        self.rotate = config.rotate
    else
        self.rotate = true
    end
    self.rotationSpeed = config.rotationSpeed or 125
    self.engagedSpeed = config.engagedSpeed or 2.5
    self.shootCooldown = config.shootCooldown or 1
    self.maxHealth = config.maxHealth or 5
    self.searchTime = config.searchTime or 3
    return self
end

-- Computed property getters from the C# source.
function Turret:_source()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Turret:_tBase()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Base")
end

function Turret:_tWeapon()
    local base = self:_tBase()
    return base and base:FindFirstChild("Weapon")
end

function Turret:_tOrigin()
    local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
    return weapon and weapon:FindFirstChild("Origin")
end

function Turret:_sightRadius()
    -- Unity: transform.Find("Collider").GetComponent<SphereCollider>().radius (metres) -> studs.
    local col = self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Collider")
    if col then
        local r = col:GetAttribute("radius")
        if r then
            return r * STUDS_PER_METER
        end
        if col:IsA("BasePart") then
            return math.max(col.Size.X, col.Size.Y, col.Size.Z) * 0.5
        end
    end
    return 10 * STUDS_PER_METER
end

function Turret:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerStay(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignalStay(self.gameObject, function(other)
        if self.state == State.Engaged then
            return
        end
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then
            return
        end
        local char = plr.Character
        if not char then
            return
        end
        local base = self:_tBase()
        if not base then
            return
        end
        local baseCF = base:GetPivot()
        local basePos = baseCF.Position
        local dir = char:GetPivot().Position - basePos
        if dir.Magnitude <= 0 then
            return
        end
        -- Vector3.Angle(dir, tBase.forward)
        local angle = math.deg(math.acos(math.clamp(dir.Unit:Dot(baseCF.LookVector), -1, 1)))
        if angle < 55 then
            local params = RaycastParams.new()
            params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
            params.FilterDescendantsInstances = { self.gameObject }
            local result = workspace:Raycast(basePos, dir.Unit * self:_sightRadius(), params)
            if result and result.Instance then
                local hitPlr = self.host.playerFromTouch(result.Instance)
                if hitPlr and hitPlr.Character then
                    local target = hitPlr.Character
                    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
                        self:_engagedUpdate(target)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end)

    -- OnTriggerExit(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "TouchEnded", function(other)
        if self.state == State.Engaged then
            local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
            if plr then
                self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
                    self:_searchUpdate()
                end)
            end
        end
    end)
end

function Turret:Start()
    self.health = self.maxHealth
    -- Random.Range(0, 1f) > 0.5f ? Vector3.up : Vector3.down
    if math.random() > 0.5 then
        self.rotateDir = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
    else
        self.rotateDir = Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
    end
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:_defaultUpdate()
    end)
end

-- Decrements health when damage taken and handles death event.
function Turret:TakeDamage()
    self.health = self.health - 1
    local src = self:_source()
    if src then
        -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f)
        src.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * (1.2 - 0.8) + 0.8
        -- source.PlayOneShot(hitSound)
        if self.hitSound then
            src.SoundId = self.hitSound
            src:Play()
        end
    end
    if self.health <= 0 then
        local base = self:_tBase()
        local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
        local spawnPos
        if base then
            spawnPos = base:GetPivot().Position
        else
            spawnPos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
        end
        -- Instantiate(explosionPrefab/smokePrefab, tBase.position, Quaternion.identity)
        self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosionPrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(spawnPos))
        self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.smokePrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(spawnPos))
        if weapon then
            self.host.destroy(weapon)
        end
        if base then
            self.host.destroy(base)
        end
        self.enabled = false
        self.host.destroy(self)
    end
end

-- Continuously rotates the turret to search for targets.
function Turret:_defaultUpdate()
    self.state = State.Default
    while self.state == State.Default do
        local dt = task.wait()
        if self.rotate then
            local base = self:_tBase()
            if base then
                -- tBase.Rotate(rotateDir, dt * rotationSpeed) (local-space, degrees)
                local deg = dt * self.rotationSpeed
                base:PivotTo(base:GetPivot() * CFrame.fromAxisAngle(self.rotateDir, math.rad(deg)))
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Rotates the turret aiming for the target.
function Turret:_engagedUpdate(target)
    self.state = State.Engaged
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:_engagedShooting()
    end)
    while self.state == State.Engaged do
        local dt = task.wait()
        if not (target and target.Parent) then
            break
        end
        local base = self:_tBase()
        local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
        if base and weapon then
            local baseCF = base:GetPivot()
            local basePos = baseCF.Position
            local targetPos = target:GetPivot().Position
            local dir = targetPos - basePos
            if dir.Magnitude > 0 then
                -- tBase.rotation = Quaternion.Lerp(tBase.rotation, LookRotation(dir), dt * engagedSpeed)
                local goal = CFrame.lookAt(basePos, basePos + dir)
                base:PivotTo(baseCF:Lerp(goal, dt * self.engagedSpeed))
            end
            -- tWeapon.LookAt(target) then clamp local pitch to [-30, 30], zero yaw/roll.
            local newBaseCF = base:GetPivot()
            local weaponPos = weapon:GetPivot().Position
            local localDir = newBaseCF:VectorToObjectSpace(targetPos - weaponPos)
            local pitch = math.deg(math.atan2(localDir.Y, -localDir.Z))
            if pitch > 180 then
                pitch = pitch - 360
            end
            pitch = math.clamp(pitch, -30, 30)
            weapon:PivotTo(newBaseCF * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(pitch), 0, 0))
        end
    end
end

-- Shoots at the target in timed intervals.
function Turret:_engagedShooting()
    task.wait(self.shootCooldown)
    while self.state == State.Engaged do
        local origin = self:_tOrigin()
        if origin then
            -- Instantiate(turretBullet, tOrigin.position, tOrigin.rotation)
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.turretBullet, workspace, origin:GetPivot())
        end
        local src = self:_source()
        if src then
            src.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * (1.2 - 0.8) + 0.8
            src:Play()
        end
        task.wait(self.shootCooldown)
    end
end

-- Keeps position waiting for a potential target.
function Turret:_searchUpdate()
    self.state = State.Search
    local time = 0
    while self.state == State.Search and time < self.searchTime do
        local dt = task.wait()
        time = time + dt
    end
    if self.state == State.Search then
        self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
            self:_defaultUpdate()
        end)
    end
end

return Turret

scripts.name: TurretBullet
scripts.source:
local TurretBullet = {}
TurretBullet.__index = TurretBullet

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function TurretBullet.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, TurretBullet)
    self.fadeTime = config.fadeTime or 3
    self.force = config.force or 60
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    return self
end

function TurretBullet:getRb()
    return self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
end

function TurretBullet:Awake()
    -- OnCollisionEnter(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        local char = plr.Character
        local hum = char and char:FindFirstChildOfType("Humanoid")
        if hum then
            hum:TakeDamage(self.damage)
        end
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

function TurretBullet:Start()
    -- rb.AddRelativeForce(Vector3.forward * force, ForceMode.Impulse)
    local rb = self:getRb()
    if rb then
        local impulse = rb.CFrame.LookVector * self.force
        rb:ApplyImpulse(impulse)
    end

    -- Destroy(gameObject, fadeTime): bound to the target's lifetime, so use raw task.delay.
    task.delay(self.fadeTime, function()
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

return TurretBullet

scripts.name: MeshContainer
scripts.source:
local MeshContainer = {}
MeshContainer.__index = MeshContainer

function MeshContainer.new(m)
    local self = setmetatable({}, MeshContainer)

    self.mesh = m
    -- UNCONVERTED: Mesh.vertices / Mesh.normals read back the mesh's geometry
    -- arrays. Roblox MeshPart exposes no runtime vertex/normal buffers, so these
    -- snapshots are nil unless a host surface supplies them.
    self.vertices = m and m.vertices or nil
    self.normals = m and m.normals or nil

    return self
end

function MeshContainer:Update()
    -- UNCONVERTED: writes cached vertex/normal arrays back into the mesh
    -- (mesh.vertices = vertices; mesh.normals = normals). Roblox meshes have no
    -- writable per-vertex geometry at runtime, so this is an inert assignment.
    if self.mesh then
        self.mesh.vertices = self.vertices
        self.mesh.normals = self.normals
    end
end

return MeshContainer

local PlanarReflection = {}
PlanarReflection.__index = PlanarReflection

function PlanarReflection.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, PlanarReflection)

    self.reflectionMask = config.reflectionMask or -1
    if config.reflectSkybox ~= nil then
        self.reflectSkybox = config.reflectSkybox

        self.reflectSkybox = false
    end
    self.clearColor = config.clearColor or Color3.fromRGB(128, 128, 128)
    self.reflectionSampler = config.reflectionSampler or "_ReflectionTex"
    self.clipPlaneOffset = config.clipPlaneOffset or 0.07

    self.m_Oldpos = nil

end

function PlanarReflection:Start()

    -- uniform/texture writes, so there is nothing to cache.
end

function PlanarReflection:CreateReflectionCameraFor(cam)

function PlanarReflection:RenderHelpCameras(currentCam)

function PlanarReflection:LateUpdate(dt)

function PlanarReflection:WaterTileBeingRendered(tr, currentCam)

function PlanarReflection:OnEnable()

end

function PlanarReflection:OnDisable()

end

function PlanarReflection:RenderReflectionFor(cam, reflectCamera)
    -- UNCONVERTED: full planar-reflection render — culling mask, oblique
    -- projection, worldToCameraMatrix, reflection matrix, GL.invertCulling, and
    -- Camera.Render(). None of these are representable in Roblox.
end

function PlanarReflection:SaneCameraSettings(helperCam)

function PlanarReflection.CalculateObliqueMatrix(projection, clipPlane)

end

function PlanarReflection.CalculateReflectionMatrix(reflectionMat, plane)

function PlanarReflection.Sgn(a)
    if a > 0.0 then
        return 1.0
    end
    if a < 0.0 then
        return -1.0
    end
    return 0.0

scripts.name: SpecularLighting
scripts.source:
local SpecularLighting = {}
SpecularLighting.__index = SpecularLighting

function SpecularLighting.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, SpecularLighting)
    -- specularLight is a serialized Transform reference; injected on self before Awake.
    self.m_WaterBase = nil
    return self
end

function SpecularLighting:Start()
    self.m_WaterBase = self:GetComponent("WaterBase")
end

function SpecularLighting:Update(dt)
    if not self.m_WaterBase then
        self.m_WaterBase = self:GetComponent("WaterBase")
    end

    if self.specularLight and self.m_WaterBase and self.m_WaterBase.sharedMaterial then
        -- UNCONVERTED: m_WaterBase.sharedMaterial.SetVector("_WorldLightDir",

        -- shader uniform writes. The forward direction would be
        -- self.specularLight:GetPivot().LookVector, but there is no shader uniform
        -- target to write it to.
    end
end

local WaterTile = {}
WaterTile.__index = WaterTile

function WaterTile.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, WaterTile)

    -- Scene-reference fields (PlanarReflection / WaterBase peers). Not scalar
    -- config and not asset/prefab/SO injections, so they start nil and are
    -- resolved in Start via AcquireComponents (matching the Unity fallback).
    self.reflection = nil
    self.waterBase = nil

    return self
end

function WaterTile:Start()
    self:AcquireComponents()
end

function WaterTile:AcquireComponents()
    -- Unity prefers the parent's component then falls back to self's. The host
    -- registry does not index converted MonoBehaviours across the hierarchy and
    -- exposes no parent-component primitive, so this resolves the peer on
    -- self.gameObject (the transform.GetComponent fallback branch).
    if not self.reflection then
        self.reflection = self:GetComponent("PlanarReflection")
    end

    if not self.waterBase then
        self.waterBase = self:GetComponent("WaterBase")
    end
end

function WaterTile:OnWillRenderObject()
    -- UNCONVERTED: per-camera render callback. Unity fires this each time the
    -- tile is about to be rendered by a Camera (Camera.current), handing its
    -- transform to PlanarReflection/WaterBase.WaterTileBeingRendered to bind the
    -- reflection RenderTexture. Roblox has no per-camera render hook and the
    -- WaterTileBeingRendered targets are themselves unconvertible (no scriptable
    -- render-texture pipeline).
end

return WaterTile

scripts.name: AfterburnerPhysicsForce
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

-- Mathf.InverseLerp(a, b, t): normalized position of t between a and b, clamped 0..1.
local function inverseLerp(a, b, t)
    if a == b then
        return 0
    end
    local v = (t - a) / (b - a)
    if v < 0 then
        v = 0
    elseif v > 1 then
        v = 1
    end
    return v
end

local AfterburnerPhysicsForce = {}
AfterburnerPhysicsForce.__index = AfterburnerPhysicsForce

function AfterburnerPhysicsForce.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, AfterburnerPhysicsForce)
    self.effectAngle = config.effectAngle or 15
    self.effectWidth = config.effectWidth or 1
    self.effectDistance = config.effectDistance or 10
    self.force = config.force or 10
    self.m_Sphere = nil
    return self
end

function AfterburnerPhysicsForce:OnEnable()
    self.m_Sphere = self:GetComponent("SphereCollider")
end

function AfterburnerPhysicsForce:FixedUpdate(dt)
    local pivot = self.gameObject:GetPivot()
    local position = pivot.Position

    -- Roblox has no SphereCollider center/radius accessor; mirror the gizmo's
    -- own derivation (center at 0,0, radius = effectDistance * 0.5).
    local center = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    local radius = self.effectDistance * 0.5

    local origin = position + center
    local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(origin, radius * STUDS_PER_METER)

    for n = 1, #cols do
        local col = cols[n]
        if col:IsA("BasePart") and not col.Anchored then
            local colPos = col.Position

            -- transform.InverseTransformPoint(col.position)
            local localPos = pivot:PointToObjectSpace(colPos)

            -- Vector3.MoveTowards(localPos, Vector3(0,0,localPos.z), effectWidth*0.5)
            local target = Vector3.new(0, 0, localPos.Z)
            local toTarget = target - localPos
            local dist = toTarget.Magnitude
            local maxDelta = self.effectWidth * 0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER
            if dist <= maxDelta or dist == 0 then
                localPos = target
            else
                localPos = localPos + toTarget.Unit * maxDelta
            end

            local angle = math.abs(math.deg(math.atan2(localPos.X, localPos.Z)))
            local falloff = inverseLerp(self.effectDistance * STUDS_PER_METER, 0, localPos.Magnitude)
            falloff = falloff * inverseLerp(self.effectAngle, 0, angle)

            local delta = colPos - position

            -- Vector3.Lerp(colPos, transform.TransformPoint(0,0,localPos.z), 0.1)
            local worldZ = pivot:PointToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(0, 0, localPos.Z))
            local applyAt = colPos + (worldZ - colPos) * 0.1

            local impulse = delta.Unit * self.force * falloff
            col:ApplyImpulseAtPosition(impulse, applyAt)
        end
    end
end

function AfterburnerPhysicsForce:OnDrawGizmosSelected()
    -- UNCONVERTED: editor-only gizmo drawing (Gizmos.*) has no Roblox runtime equivalent.
end

return AfterburnerPhysicsForce

scripts.name: ExplosionFireAndDebris
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Class = {}
Class.__index = Class

-- Random point inside a unit sphere (rejection sampling).
local function randomInsideUnitSphere()
    local v
    repeat
        v = Vector3.new(math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1)
    until v.Magnitude <= 1
    return v
end

-- Random point on the surface of a unit sphere.
local function randomOnUnitSphere()
    local v
    repeat
        v = Vector3.new(math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1)
    until v.Magnitude > 1e-4
    return v.Unit
end

-- Random.rotation -> random orientation CFrame.
local function randomRotation()
    return CFrame.Angles(
        math.random() * 2 * math.pi,
        math.random() * 2 * math.pi,
        math.random() * 2 * math.pi
    )
end

function Class.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Class)
    self.numDebrisPieces = config.numDebrisPieces or 0
    self.numFires = config.numFires or 0
    return self
end

-- pos += normal*0.5; Instantiate(firePrefab, pos, identity); fire.parent = t
function Class:AddFire(t, pos, normal)
    pos = pos + normal * (0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER)
    self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.firePrefab, t, CFrame.new(pos))
end

function Class:Start()
    -- C# Start() is an IEnumerator coroutine (yields a frame mid-body).
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        local multiplier = self:GetComponent("ParticleSystemMultiplier").multiplier

        local basePos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position

        local n = 0
        while n < self.numDebrisPieces * multiplier do
            -- debrisPrefabs[Random.Range(0, debrisPrefabs.Length)] (1-indexed in Luau)
            local prefab = self.debrisPrefabs[math.random(1, #self.debrisPrefabs)]
            local pos = basePos + randomInsideUnitSphere() * (3 * multiplier * STUDS_PER_METER)
            local rot = randomRotation()
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(prefab, nil, CFrame.new(pos) * rot)
            n = n + 1
        end

        -- wait one frame so the new objects are picked up by the overlap query
        task.wait()

        local numFires = self.numFires

        local r = 10 * multiplier * STUDS_PER_METER
        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(basePos, r)
        for _, col in cols do
            if numFires > 0 then
                -- Raycast against this specific collider, up to distance r.
                local dir = col.Position - basePos
                if dir.Magnitude > 1e-4 then
                    local params = RaycastParams.new()
                    params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
                    params.FilterDescendantsInstances = { col }
                    local fireHit = workspace:Raycast(basePos, dir.Unit * r, params)
                    if fireHit then
                        self:AddFire(col, fireHit.Position, fireHit.Normal)
                        numFires = numFires - 1
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        local testR = 0
        while numFires > 0 and testR < r do
            local origin = basePos + Vector3.new(0, 1 * STUDS_PER_METER, 0)
            local dir = randomOnUnitSphere()
            local fireHit = workspace:Raycast(origin, dir * testR, RaycastParams.new())
            if fireHit then
                self:AddFire(nil, fireHit.Position, fireHit.Normal)
                numFires = numFires - 1
            end
            testR = testR + r * 0.1
        end

        self.numFires = numFires
    end)
end

return Class

scripts.name: ExplosionPhysicsForce
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local ExplosionPhysicsForce = {}
ExplosionPhysicsForce.__index = ExplosionPhysicsForce

function ExplosionPhysicsForce.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ExplosionPhysicsForce)
    self.explosionForce = config.explosionForce or 4
    return self
end

function ExplosionPhysicsForce:Start()
    -- Start was an IEnumerator coroutine in Unity; run it lifecycle-scoped.
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        -- yield return null: wait one frame because some explosions instantiate
        -- debris which should then be pushed by physics force.
        task.wait()

        -- float multiplier = GetComponent<ParticleSystemMultiplier>().multiplier;
        local psm = self:GetComponent("ParticleSystemMultiplier")
        local multiplier = psm.multiplier

        -- float r = 10*multiplier; (Unity metres -> studs for spatial queries)
        local r = 10 * multiplier * STUDS_PER_METER

        local origin = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position

        -- var cols = Physics.OverlapSphere(transform.position, r);
        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(origin, r)

        -- Collect unique rigidbodies (Roblox: unique assemblies). col.attachedRigidbody
        -- != null  ->  part is dynamic (not Anchored); dedupe by AssemblyRootPart.
        local rigidbodies = {}
        local seen = {}
        for _, col in cols do
            if not col.Anchored then
                local root = col.AssemblyRootPart
                if root and not seen[root] then
                    seen[root] = true
                    table.insert(rigidbodies, root)
                end
            end
        end

        -- foreach rb: rb.AddExplosionForce(explosionForce*multiplier, transform.position,
        --                                  r, 1*multiplier, ForceMode.Impulse);
        -- Roblox has no AddExplosionForce; approximate with a radial impulse that
        -- falls off with distance, plus an upwards modifier (shifts the explosion
        -- origin down so the impulse arcs upward).
        local force = self.explosionForce * multiplier
        local upwardsModifier = (1 * multiplier) * STUDS_PER_METER
        local appliedOrigin = origin - Vector3.new(0, upwardsModifier, 0)
        for _, rb in rigidbodies do
            local dir = rb.Position - appliedOrigin
            local dist = dir.Magnitude
            local falloff = math.max(0, 1 - dist / r)
            if dist > 0 and falloff > 0 then
                rb:ApplyImpulse(dir.Unit * (force * falloff))
            end
        end
    end)
end

return ExplosionPhysicsForce

scripts.name: Explosive
scripts.source:
local ObjectResetter = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("ObjectResetter", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("ObjectResetter", true))

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Explosive = {}
Explosive.__index = Explosive

function Explosive.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Explosive)
    self.detonationImpactVelocity = config.detonationImpactVelocity or 10
    self.sizeMultiplier = config.sizeMultiplier or 1
    self.reset = config.reset
    if self.reset == nil then
        self.reset = true
    end
    self.resetTimeDelay = config.resetTimeDelay or 10
    self.m_Exploded = false
    self.m_ObjectResetter = nil
    return self
end

function Explosive:Start()
    self.m_ObjectResetter = self:GetComponent("ObjectResetter")
end

function Explosive:Awake()
    -- OnCollisionEnter(col)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- compare relative velocity to collision normal - so we don't explode from a fast but gentle glancing collision
        -- Roblox .Touched carries no contact set; approximate the relative impact speed from the two assemblies' velocities.
        local selfVel = Vector3.zero
        if self.gameObject:IsA("BasePart") then
            selfVel = self.gameObject.AssemblyLinearVelocity
        end
        local otherVel = Vector3.zero
        if other and other:IsA("BasePart") then
            otherVel = other.AssemblyLinearVelocity
        end
        local velocityAlongCollisionNormal = (selfVel - otherVel).Magnitude

        if velocityAlongCollisionNormal > self.detonationImpactVelocity * STUDS_PER_METER or self.m_Exploded then
            if not self.m_Exploded then
                -- contact point + normal approximated from the touched part's position
                local point = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
                if other and other:IsA("BasePart") then
                    point = other.Position
                end
                local normal = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position - point
                if normal.Magnitude < 1e-4 then
                    normal = Vector3.yAxis
                end
                local cframe = CFrame.lookAt(point, point + normal.Unit)
                self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosionPrefab, workspace, cframe)
                self.m_Exploded = true

                -- UNCONVERTED: SendMessage("Immobilize") broadcast dispatch has no Roblox equivalent (Roblox does not dispatch component methods by name)

                if self.reset then
                    self.m_ObjectResetter:DelayedReset(self.resetTimeDelay)
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

function Explosive:Reset()
    self.m_Exploded = false
end

return Explosive

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local FireLight = {}
FireLight.__index = FireLight

function FireLight.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, FireLight)
    self.m_Rnd = 0
    self.m_Burning = true
    self.m_Light = nil
    return self
end

function FireLight:Start()
    self.m_Rnd = math.random() * 100
    self.m_Light = self:GetComponent("Light")
end

function FireLight:Update(dt)
    if self.m_Burning then
        local t = time()
        if self.m_Light then
            self.m_Light.Brightness = 2 * math.noise(self.m_Rnd + t, self.m_Rnd + 1 + t * 1)
        end
        local x = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 0 + t * 2, self.m_Rnd + 1 + t * 2) - 0.5
        local y = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 2 + t * 2, self.m_Rnd + 3 + t * 2) - 0.5
        local z = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 4 + t * 2, self.m_Rnd + 5 + t * 2) - 0.5
        local localOffset = (Vector3.new(0, 1, 0) + Vector3.new(x, y, z) * 1) * STUDS_PER_METER
        local parent = self.gameObject.Parent
        if parent then
            self.gameObject:PivotTo(parent:GetPivot() * CFrame.new(localOffset))
        else
            self.gameObject:PivotTo(CFrame.new(localOffset))
        end
    end
end

function FireLight:Extinguish()
    self.m_Burning = false
    if self.m_Light then
        self.m_Light.Enabled = false
    end
end

return FireLight

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Hose = {}
Hose.__index = Hose

function Hose.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Hose)
    self.maxPower = config.maxPower or 20
    self.minPower = config.minPower or 5
    self.changeSpeed = config.changeSpeed or 5
    self.m_Power = 0
    self.m_Alpha1Was = false
    return self
end

function Hose:Update(dt)
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local target = UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) and self.maxPower or self.minPower
    local t = dt * self.changeSpeed
    self.m_Power = self.m_Power + (target - self.m_Power) * t

    -- Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Alpha1): edge-detect rising press
    local alpha1Now = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.One)
    if alpha1Now and not self.m_Alpha1Was then
        if self.systemRenderer then
            self.systemRenderer.Enabled = not self.systemRenderer.Enabled
        end
    end
    self.m_Alpha1Was = alpha1Now

    if self.hoseWaterSystems then
        for _, system in self.hoseWaterSystems do
            if system then
                system.Speed = NumberRange.new(self.m_Power * STUDS_PER_METER)
                system.Enabled = (self.m_Power > self.minPower * 1.1)
            end
        end
    end
end

return Hose

scripts.name: ParticleSystemMultiplier
scripts.source:
local ParticleSystemMultiplier = {}
ParticleSystemMultiplier.__index = ParticleSystemMultiplier

function ParticleSystemMultiplier.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ParticleSystemMultiplier)
    self.multiplier = config.multiplier or 1
    return self
end

function ParticleSystemMultiplier:Start()
    -- Mathf.Lerp(multiplier, 1, 0.5f) for the lifetime multiplier.
    local lifetimeMultiplier = self.multiplier + (1 - self.multiplier) * 0.5

    -- GetComponentsInChildren<ParticleSystem>(): walk descendants and filter.
    -- Roblox's ParticleEmitter is the closest analog to Unity's ParticleSystem.
    local systems = {}
    for _, descendant in self.gameObject:GetDescendants() do
        if descendant:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
            table.insert(systems, descendant)
        end
    end

    for _, system in systems do
        -- mainModule.startSizeMultiplier = multiplier
        -- Size is a NumberSequence; scale each keypoint value by the multiplier.
        local sizeKeypoints = {}
        for _, kp in system.Size.Keypoints do
            table.insert(sizeKeypoints, NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, kp.Value * self.multiplier, kp.Envelope * self.multiplier))
        end
        system.Size = NumberSequence.new(sizeKeypoints)

        -- mainModule.startSpeedMultiplier = multiplier
        -- Speed is a NumberRange; scale min and max.
        system.Speed = NumberRange.new(system.Speed.Min * self.multiplier, system.Speed.Max * self.multiplier)

        -- mainModule.startLifetimeMultiplier = Mathf.Lerp(multiplier, 1, 0.5f)
        -- Lifetime is a NumberRange; scale min and max.
        system.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(system.Lifetime.Min * lifetimeMultiplier, system.Lifetime.Max * lifetimeMultiplier)

        -- system.Clear()
        system:Clear()
        -- system.Play()
        system.Enabled = true
    end
end

return ParticleSystemMultiplier

scripts.name: ObjectResetter
scripts.source:
local ObjectResetter = {}
ObjectResetter.__index = ObjectResetter

local function collectTransforms(root)
    local result = {}
    table.insert(result, root)
    for _, descendant in root:GetDescendants() do
        table.insert(result, descendant)
    end
    return result
end

function ObjectResetter.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ObjectResetter)
    self.originalPosition = nil
    self.originalRotation = nil
    self.originalStructure = nil
    self.Rigidbody = nil
    return self
end

function ObjectResetter:Start()
    self.originalStructure = collectTransforms(self.gameObject)
    local pivot = self.gameObject:GetPivot()
    self.originalPosition = pivot.Position
    self.originalRotation = pivot.Rotation

    self.Rigidbody = self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
end

function ObjectResetter:DelayedReset(delay)
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:ResetCoroutine(delay)
    end)
end

function ObjectResetter:ResetCoroutine(delay)
    task.wait(delay)

    -- remove any gameobjects added (fire, skid trails, etc)
    for _, t in collectTransforms(self.gameObject) do
        if not table.find(self.originalStructure, t) then
            t.Parent = nil
        end
    end

    self.gameObject:PivotTo(CFrame.new(self.originalPosition) * self.originalRotation)
    if self.Rigidbody then
        self.Rigidbody.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
        self.Rigidbody.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
    end

    -- UNCONVERTED: SendMessage("Reset") broadcast dispatch has no Roblox equivalent (Roblox does not dispatch component methods by name)
end

return ObjectResetter
